figures.caption: Figure 4: Example extracted rules per specification type from the airline-agent trace.
Figure 3: The AgentPex pipeline from raw trace import through specification extraction to evaluation and aggregate scoring.
Figure 1: The agent reaches the correct final outcome but violates the transition, output, and predicted-plan specifications. AgentPex flags these violations.

Figure 8: ROC and Precision–Recall curves for output_spec when classifying 𝜏2 failures. Red dots indicate candidate score thresholds (50–80). ROC-AUC = 0.680. Dashed lines denote random (ROC) and base-rate (PR) baselines.
Figure 9: 𝜏2 composite and AgentPex aggregate scores are similar across models.
Figure 7: Per-metric scores by domain. Predicted plan reflects telecom difficulty.
